docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $462.00 FILED BY O'GRADY PLUMBING AS TO DEFENDANT PICKERS, JANET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RE-SERVED THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-22-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE DEFENDANT, PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PAUL O'GRADY--BUSINESS OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
